sub_modules.fft16_butterfly: Combinational fixed-point radix-2 complex butterfly with FFT/IFFT twiddle sign selection and Q1.15 rounded multiplication.
sub_modules.fft16_twiddle_rom: Combinational Q1.15 twiddle coefficient lookup table for N=16 using the required cosine and sine convention.
sub_modules.fft16_addr_gen: Combinational stage and butterfly index decoder that generates memory addresses and twiddle indices for the iterative controller.
sub_modules.fft16_bit_reverse_loader: Combinational loader that maps natural-order inputs into bit-reversed memory order for radix-2 DIT FFT processing.
